name: Noriko Ashida
text: You may include up to 5 cards with a printed [energy] resource in your deck from aspects other than your own. New X-Men — Action: Exhaust Noriko Ashida → search your deck for an [[x-men]] ally and add it to your hand.

name: Surge
text: Uncontrolled Surge — Forced Response: After you play a card with a printed [energy] resource, ready your identity and draw 1 card. If a card with a printed [energy] resource was drawn this way, take 1 damage. (Limit once per phase.)

name: Prodigy
text: Mimic — Response: After a character you control thwarts, Prodigy gets +1 THW until the end of the phase (to a maximum of +3 THW). “Knowledge isn't power. It's an intrinsic good. It betters the world simply by existing.”

name: Gauntlets
text: Interrupt: When you would take damage from “Uncontrolled Surge“, exhaust Gauntlets → cancel that damage. Action: Exhaust Gauntlets → shuffle 1 identity-specific card from your discard pile into your deck.

name: Double Strike
text: Hero Response: After you play an [[attack ]]event, discard 1 card from your hand → deal 2 damage to an enemy. Deal 2 additional damage to that enemy for each printed [energy] resource on the card discarded this way.

name: Haste
text: Hero Interrupt: When the surge keyword on an encounter card would be resolved, exhaust Haste instead. “'ScuseMe StepAsideComin' Through!”

name: Intense Training
text: Action: Exhaust your identity and an ally you control → shuffle up to 3 identity specific cards from your discard pile into your deck. Draw 2 cards. If you are in hero form, discard 1 card from your hand.

name: Keep At Bay
text: Hero Interrupt (defense): When a friendly character would take any amount of damage from an attack, prevent 3 of that damage. If you paid for this card using a [energy] resource, deal 3 damage to the attacker.

name: Full Blast
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 6 damage to an enemy. If the number of [energy] resource spent to pay for this card is at least: • 1 — This attack gains ranged • 2 — This attack also gains piercing • 3 — This attack also gains overkill

name: Situation Control
text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 3 threat from a scheme. You may exhaust an ally you control to remove 3 threat from a scheme. “Have to find a way... My responsibility... My burden...”

name: Gather Energy
text: Hero Action: Choose up to 3 cards with a printed [energy] resource in your discard pile not named Gather Energy and place them on the top of your deck. “My mutant powers let me absorb static electricity and then discharge it whenever i want...”

name: Lead the Team
text: Hero Action: Ready your identity. Return the topmost ally with a printed [energy] resource in your discard pile to your hand. “Everybody get ready!”

name: Supportive Partner
text: Team-Up (Surge and Prodigy). Max 1 per deck. Hero Action: Ready Surge and Prodigy. Heal 2 damage from each of them.
